channel.title: Jeremydmiller.com on .NET Ramblings
channel.description: Recent content in Jeremydmiller.com on .NET Ramblings

item.title: Multi-Tenancy in the Critter Stack
item.description: We put on another Critter Stack live stream today to give a highlight tour of the multi-tenancy features and support across the entire stack. Long story short, I think we have by far and away the most comprehensive feature set for multi-tenancy in the .NET ecosystem, but I’ll let you judge that for yourself: The … Continue reading Multi-Tenancy in the Critter Stack → Link to article: https://jeremydmiller.com/2026/04/01/multi-tenancy-in-the-critter-stack/

item.title: Critter Stack Wide Releases — March Madness Edition
item.description: As anybody knows who follows the Critter Stack on our Discord server, I’m uncomfortable with the rapid pace of releases that we’ve sustained in the past couple quarters and I think I would like the release cadence to slow down. However, open issues and pull requests feel like money burning a hole in my pocket, … Continue reading Critter Stack Wide Releases — March Madness Edition → Link to article: https://jeremydmiller.

item.title: The World’s Crudest Chaos Monkey
item.description: I’m working pretty hard this week and early next to deliver the CritterWatch MVP (our new management and observability console for the Critter Stack) to a JasperFx Software client. One of the things we need to do for testing is to fake out several failure conditions in message handlers to be able to test CritterWatch’s … Continue reading The World’s Crudest Chaos Monkey → Link to article: https://jeremydmiller.com/2026/03/26/the-worlds-crudest-chaos-monkey/
